scores.notes: OCR output has minor typos (e.g., 'GR&DCRESEARCHPR0GRAMME&RES0URCEALL0CATI0N1984-1986'), missing sections (e.g., 'Document Type', 'Key Details', 'Insights and Observations'), and layout deviations (e.g., unordered distribution list). However, key numeric data (dates) and table-like structures (distribution list) are mostly preserved.
